g.text: Figure 8X. Robustness compass under the current formal result boundary

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10.5px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Positive/negative signs in parentheses indicate directional consistency without strong significance. The core message remains narrow: execution and procurement structure survive several checks; quality Z stays directionally positive but unstable.
